description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a sleek, rectangular display framed by a thin, black bezel. The front of the screen features a large, clear display area with a green and white logo reading 'MENTIMUN MULUS STUDIO' and an illustrated cucumber character. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular stand with a wide, flat base and a central support column, which appears to provide stability. The rear of the monitor is angular and faceted, with a matte black finish and no visible buttons or ports. The side views reveal the monitor's ultra-thin profile and the solid, geometric construction of the stand. The overall design is minimalist and professional, suitable for office or studio environments.
description: A sleek, flat-screen computer monitor with a thin black bezel, a wide rectangular stand, and a prominent front display featuring a green studio logo.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the monitor's angular, faceted back panel and the central support column attached to a wide, flat base.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the monitor's ultra-thin profile and the solid, rectangular shape of the stand.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large screen area with a thin bezel and a green 'MENTIMUN MULUS STUDIO' logo, along with the wide, flat base.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the slimness of the monitor and the geometric stand design.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and black with a matte finish, providing a minimal and modern frame around the display area. No decorative elements or color contrasts are present.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, flat rectangular base with a central, rectangular support column, made of matte black material. It appears solid and stable, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single power button is implied on the lower bezel or base, but no physical buttons are visibly detailed in the images.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, green and white 'MENTIMUN MULUS STUDIO' logo with a cucumber character is prominently displayed on the front screen area.
